ItacPersonItem.Notes: Also known as Gioseppe Munebria Marino (see Gio. Battista Crisci, L`Orinthia - Napoli, Beltrano, 1635) Not recorded by Maylender as a member of the Chiari academy in Catania. See For a short biographical account see Antonino Mongitore, Bibliotheca Sicula, Didaci Bua, Palermo, Vol.I, p. 394 (BL Shelfmark:610.m.10.); Francesco Ferrara, Storia di Catania, Catania, 1829 (BL Shelfmark:General Reference Collection SFX lsidyv363f3ec8)
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
